import React from 'react' import { UserImageURL } from './Const' import Translate from '../../Components/Utils/Translate' type TUserData = {username:string | null, is_super_user:number | undefined } const Header = () => { const UserData:TUserData = {username:null,is_super_user:1} return (
{UserData?.username ?? "unknow"}

{UserData?.is_super_user === 1 ? "super admin " : " admin " }

) } export default Header
